selectCustomer.title: Select a customer first
selectCustomer.description: Use the customer switcher in the top bar to select which client's EPR data you want to manage.

autofill.scopeWarningBody: Invoice-based auto-fill is best suited for businesses that primarily sell packaging materials (bags, bottles, cartons). If your invoices list packaged products (e.g. food items, machine parts), results may be incomplete or inaccurate — a product-packaging registry is required for correct EPR calculation.
autofill.fetchError: Failed to fetch invoices. Please try again.
autofill.navUnavailable: NAV Online Számla is not available.
autofill.noResults: No invoice lines found for the selected period.

dialog.recurringTooltip: Recurring materials are automatically included when copying to a new quarter. Uncheck for one-time or campaign-specific packaging.

hints.step1: Select the main product category (e.g., packaging, electronics, tires).
hints.step2: What material is the item you are reporting made of?
hints.step3depositGroup: Select the container type that this material component belongs to. For example, a wooden closure on a PET bottle: the material is "Wood", the container is "PET bottle".
hints.step3subgroup: Select the specific subtype to finalize the classification.
